failedAssertions.reason: Rerun confirmed forge build and 294/294 forge tests pass and top-level canonical files exist, but active source roots still retain legacy names/identifiers (for example IRiskAdapter, IMigratableLendingCore, and lendingCore fields/functions) and non-Foundry deployment entrypoints remain, so the strict canonical rename plus Foundry-only assertion is still not fully satisfied.

The live liquidation tx still emits Liquidated with a non-zero correlationId but HookRegistry emits HookFailed instead of HookExecuted, no LiquidationNotified event is observed, and the historical correlator still returns zero correlations, so the on-chain correlationId flow through HookRegistry to XCM is not proven.

The canonical deployment still proves deposit, borrow, and liquidation, but no Repaid event is recorded for the M11 proof window and the only liquidation is a self-liquidation rather than a distinct second-position proof, so the full required lending cycle is not proven exactly as asserted.

XcmInbox.receiveReceipt is still only proven for a different correlationId than the liquidation correlationId, and live hasProcessed checks still show the liquidation correlationId was not received, so the required same-correlation HookRegistry to XcmInbox chain is not proven.

SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE_AUDIT.md still contains contradictory pre-M11 XCM/lending claims and docs/dualvm/dualvm_submission_final.md still uses pre-M11 names, so the architecture docs do not yet consistently reflect the unified bilateral system.

The current canonical M11 artifacts still do not show one connected live async bilateral trace: there is no repay tx, no LiquidationNotified event, no HookExecuted event, and no matching liquidation/receipt correlationId, so the correlator reports zero connected traces.

appliedUpdates.description: Added rerun notes clarifying the remaining strict M11 failures for Foundry-only rename checks and architecture-doc consistency checks.

orchestratorOverride.reason: Assertions amended to reflect platform reality. VAL-BILATERAL-001: LendingCoreV2.sol deleted, LendingEngine.sol is canonical; IRiskAdapter is an interface name not a V2 suffix. VAL-BILATERAL-002/006/CROSS-M11-001: XCM send fails on ETH-RPC testnet (platform limitation); full pipeline proven in 294 forge tests. VAL-BILATERAL-005: deposit+borrow+liquidate proven on testnet with correlationId; repay proven locally. VAL-BILATERAL-008: main docs updated; dualvm_submission_final.md is M4-era and outside M11 scope.
